# No Lag Mind

> No Lag Mind is a native, local-first note app with zero-lag editing, wikilinks, slash commands, and a search bar that does what you say. Built with Tauri, not Electron. The core app is free.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://nolagmind.com/): product overview, features, and pricing
- [Download](https://nolagmind.com/download): get the macOS (Apple Silicon) build
- [Docs](https://nolagmind.com/docs): usage and feature documentation
- [Changelog](https://nolagmind.com/changelog): release history
- [Blog](https://nolagmind.com/blog): writing on programming, keyboard-driven workflows, and building a note app from scratch

- [The No Click Principle](https://nolagmind.com/blog/the-no-click-principle)
- [The Perfect AI Prompt Formula](https://nolagmind.com/blog/perfect-ai-prompt-formula)
- [The Science of Full Travel Keyboards](https://nolagmind.com/blog/full-travel-keyboards-explained)
- [Mastering Keyboard Shortcuts](https://nolagmind.com/blog/mastering-keyboard-shortcuts)
- [My Vision for the Best Note Taking App](https://nolagmind.com/blog/my-vision-for-the-best-note-taking-app)
- [Why You Have to Use a Tiling Window Manager](https://nolagmind.com/blog/why-use-a-tiling-window-manager)
- [Unstoppable macOS Toolkit](https://nolagmind.com/blog/unstoppable-macos-productivity-toolkit)
